concerns.detail: Real full name of student (Ding Yufei) disclosed alongside institutional affiliation (PKU) and personal relationship context, potentially de-anonymizing the individual
Profanity/insult ('脑残' meaning brain-dead/idiot) directed at professor without substantive criticism of advising practices
Deletion of substantive complaint about specific advisor (Junjie Hu) regarding time management and reliability, appearing to suppress legitimate observation rather than perform cleanup
concerns.excerpt:
UW-Madison Junjie Hu
  鱼王，前一秒说好，后一秒直接玩消失，毫无时间观念
